title: HKUDS/VideoAgent
abstract: All-in-One Agentic Framework for Video Understanding, Editing, and Remaking. A unified AI agent system that enables natural language-driven video comprehension, editing, and creative generation including meme videos, music videos, and cross-cultural content.
abstract_zh: VideoAgent就像你的私人视频魔术师，不管是剪辑、混音还是创造跨文化的鬼畜视频，你只需要对着它说“给我来个热门梗”，它就能秒变网红！统一的AI框架，让你轻松玩转视频世界，从音乐MV到文化碰撞的内容，一言不合就搞事情！
